columns.extraction_plan: Extract the names of the treatment arms from the 'Methods' and 'Findings' sections on page 1. The arms are: 'standard of care', 'standard of care plus abiraterone acetate 1000 mg and prednisolone 5 mg', and 'abiraterone acetate and prednisolone plus enzalutamide 160 mg'. The text also specifies which trial each arm belongs to (abiraterone trial or abiraterone and enzalutamide trial). Tables 1 on pages 5 and 6 also list these treatment arms as column headers.
